item.title: 曝苹果 M8 系列 2028 年登场，制程升级至 1.4 纳米
item.guid: 曝苹果-M8-系列-2028-年登场，制程升级至-1.4-纳米
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Apple has significantly adjusted its Mac chip roadmap for the coming years, with the M7 series chip development accelerated. The M7 Ultra chip, in particular, is designed to support up to 1.5 TB of unified memory. 据彭博社报道，苹果已对未来数年的 Mac 芯片路线图进行大幅调整，M7 系列芯片研发进度被提前，其中 M7 Ultra 芯片的设计目标是支持最高 1.5 TB 统一内存。

In addition, reports also indicate that Apple is developing a new generation of M8 series chips, with the processor codenamed 'Soko' expected to be launched in 2028, making it a key product in Apple's M8 series designed for stronger AI capabilities. 此外，报道还指出苹果正在开发新一代 M8 系列芯片，代号「Soko」的处理器预计于 2028 年推出，是苹果 M8 系列中面向更强 AI 能力打造的重点产品。

The chip is expected to use a 1.4-nanometer process, further improving energy efficiency compared to previous processes. In addition to Soko, Apple is also developing another series of new chips codenamed 'Cardinal' for high-end Macs, also belonging to the 2028 generation of products, and also transitioning to the 1.4-nanometer process. 该芯片预计将采用 1.4 纳米制程，相比此前工艺再进一步提升能效表现。除 Soko 外，苹果还在为高端 Mac 开发另一系列代号为「Cardinal」的新芯片，同样归入 2028 年这一代产品，一并转向 1.4 纳米制程。

item.title: 曝苹果计划由英特尔代工 iPhone 芯片
item.guid: 曝苹果计划由英特尔代工-iPhone-芯片
item.description:
According to The Wall Street Journal, Apple plans to outsource some of its iPhone and Mac chips to Intel. Sources revealed that this cooperation intention was reached after Apple consulted with relevant parties on supply chain investments. 据《华尔街日报》报道，苹果计划将 iPhone 及 Mac 的部分芯片交由英特尔代工。知情人士透露，这一合作意向是在苹果与相关方面就供应链投资进行磋商后达成的。

Since Pat Gelsinger took over as CEO in March last year, Intel has been committed to revitalizing its foundry business. Currently, Intel has successively attracted orders from several tech giants: 自去年 3 月陈立武出任 CEO 以来，英特尔一直致力于重振其晶圆代工业务。目前，英特尔已先后吸引了多家科技巨头的订单：

Nvidia previously announced a $5 billion investment to purchase its custom data center chips, Google Cloud also ordered a large number of Xeon processors in April this year, and Elon Musk's SpaceX also signed a cooperation agreement. 英伟达此前宣布投资 50 亿美元采购其定制数据中心芯片，Google Cloud 也在今年 4 月下单了大量 Xeon 处理器，马斯克旗下的 SpaceX 同样签署了合作协议。

Business progress shows that Intel is betting on 'advanced packaging' technology, attempting to compete with TSMC in the high-end AI chip manufacturing sector. 业务进展显示，英特尔正押注「先进封装」技术，试图在高端 AI 芯片制造领域与台积电展开竞争。

item.title: 海力士 CEO：内存供不应求或持续至 2030 年
item.guid: 海力士-CEO：内存供不应求或持续至-2030-年
item.description:
According to Reuters, SK Hynix CEO Kwak Noh-jung recently stated that the global memory industry is facing unprecedented challenges, and is expected to experience the most severe supply shortage situation in history next year. 据路透社报道，海力士 CEO 郭鲁正（Kwak Noh-jung）近日表示，全球内存行业正面临前所未有的挑战，预计明年将迎来史上最严峻的供应短缺局势。

Although the company is actively expanding capacity, Kwak Noh-jung predicts that customer demand will continue to exceed production capacity, this supply-demand imbalance may continue beyond 2030 . 尽管公司正积极扩充产能，但郭鲁正预测，客户需求将持续超过生产能力， 这种供不应求的局面可能一直延续到 2030 年以后 。

Regarding capacity expansion, Kwak Noh-jung mentioned that the United States, Japan, and Southeast Asia are all on the candidate list for future wafer fab construction, but no final decision has been made yet. Site selection will prioritize regions with sufficient and cost-competitive supplies of electricity, water resources, land, and talent. 针对产能扩张，郭鲁正提到美国、日本和东南亚均在未来建设晶圆厂的候选名单中，但目前尚未作出最终决定。选址将优先考虑电力、水资源、土地及人才供应充足且具备成本竞争力的地区。

Currently, SK Hynix plans to invest approximately $4 billion in Indiana to build an advanced packaging plant, and another $10 billion to develop AI solutions business in the United States. 目前，海力士已计划在印第安纳州投资约 40 亿美元建设先进封装厂，并投入 100 亿美元在美国开发 AI 解决方案业务。

item.title: 马斯克奥特曼再次公开对垒：互相指责对方「诈骗」与「推销谎言」
item.guid: 马斯克奥特曼再次公开对垒：互相指责对方「诈骗」与「推销谎言」
item.description:
SpaceX CEO Elon Musk and OpenAI CEO Sam Altman recently engaged in another fierce public debate. SpaceX CEO 埃隆·马斯克（Elon Musk）与 OpenAI CEO 山姆·奥特曼（Sam Altman）近日再次爆发激烈公开争论。

The conflict stemmed from Apple suing OpenAI for allegedly stealing trade secrets to develop hardware devices. Musk subsequently posted multiple attacks on Sam Altman on social media platform X, calling him 'Scam Altman' and accusing him of taking scams to 'a whole new level'. 此次冲突源于苹果公司起诉 OpenAI 涉嫌窃取商业机密以开发硬件设备，马斯克随后在社交平台 X 上多次发文攻击山姆·奥特曼，称其为「诈骗奥特曼」（Scam Altman），并指责其将诈骗提升到了「一个全新的水平」。

In response to Musk's accusations, Sam Altman later posted a rebuttal, stating that Musk was the one 'pitching short-term space data centers to public market investors.' The 'space data center' mentioned by Sam Altman refers to SpaceX's concept of deploying orbital data centers using Starlink and Starship. 针对马斯克的指责，山姆·奥特曼随后发帖反击，称马斯克才是那个「向公开市场投资者推销短期太空数据中心的人」。山姆·奥特曼提到的「太空数据中心」是指 SpaceX 计划利用 Starlink 和 Starship 部署轨道数据中心的构想。

Musk responded by saying that SpaceX would begin related flight missions next year, and taunted Sam Altman by saying, 'Perhaps you can come and see if your parole officer approves,' alluding to ongoing legal disputes. Musk further accused Sam Altman of stealing Apple's mobile phone technology after stealing from an open-source AI charity. 马斯克对此回应称，SpaceX 将于明年开始相关飞行任务，并嘲讽山姆·奥特曼称「如果你的假释官批准，或许你可以来看看」，以此影射相关法律纠纷。马斯克进一步指责山姆·奥特曼在窃取开源 AI 慈善机构后，又窃取了苹果公司的手机技术。

item.title: 智谱唐杰发内部信：启动「摸高」计划，不登顶就是失败
item.guid: 智谱唐杰发内部信：启动「摸高」计划，不登顶就是失败
item.description:
According to 36Kr, Zhipu founder Tang Jie yesterday released an internal letter titled 'The Great Wave Has Arrived' within the company, proposing to launch the 'Touch High' plan. For the next two years, the focus will be on four major directions: long-range task capabilities, autonomous agent systems, complete self-training, and extreme safety governance, with short-term commercial monetization not being the priority. 据 36 氪报道，智谱创始人唐杰昨日在公司内部发布题为《巨浪已来》的内部信，提出将启动「Touch High（摸高）」计划，未来两年聚焦长程任务能力、自治智能体系统、完全自我训练与极致安全治理四大方向，暂不以短期商业变现为优先目标。

In the internal letter, Tang Jie summarized the path to achieving AGI as three 'mountains that must be overcome': 内部信中，唐杰将 AGI 的实现路径归纳为三座「必须翻越的山峰」：

    Long-range task capabilities, meaning enabling models to plan and execute tasks spanning weeks to years;

    Fully autonomous agent systems, referring to autonomous collaboration, review, and resource scheduling by a large number of agents with different specialized capabilities;

    Complete self-training, meaning models evolve by self-writing code and self-synthesizing data.

Tang Jie stated that among the four directions, safety governance is the part he wants to emphasize most. Zhipu plans to invest tens of billions in resources for 'mechanical interpretability' research to clarify the neural logic behind model decisions and promote the transformation of models from black-box systems to interpretable systems. 唐杰表示，在四大方向中，安全治理是其最想强调的部分，智谱计划投入百亿级资源用于「机械可解释性」研究，以厘清模型决策背后的神经元逻辑，推动模型从黑盒系统向可解释系统转变。

item.title: Claude Fable 5 订阅访问权限再次续杯后，Codex 取消 5 小时使用限制
item.guid: Claude-Fable-5-订阅访问权限再次续杯后，Codex-取消-5-小时使用限制
item.description:
Anthropic announced today that access to Claude Fable 5 on all paid plans will be extended until July 19, and the measure to increase Claude Code's weekly rate limit by 50% will also remain in effect until the same date. Anthropic 今天宣布，Claude Fable 5 在所有付费计划上的访问权限将延长至 7 月 19 日，同时 Claude Code 每周速率限制提高 50% 的措施也一并保持至相同日期。

According to the original plan, Fable 5 was initially scheduled to be removed from the subscription model and switch to a purely pay-as-you-go model on June 23, then delayed to July 12. Against the backdrop of the upcoming GPT-5.6 release, Anthropic has once again extended the deadline by two days, until July 19. 按最初计划，Fable 5 原定于 6 月 23 日从订阅制中移除、转为纯按量付费模式，随后延期至 7 月 12 日。在 GPT-5.6 即将发布的背景下，Anthropic 再次将期限延长两天，直至 7 月 19 日。

Subsequently, OpenAI engineer Tibo announced on X that the 5-hour usage limit for all Plus, Business, and Pro plans has been temporarily lifted. Meanwhile, OpenAI is rolling out a series of improvements to comprehensively enhance the efficiency of GPT 5.6 Sol, aiming to reduce consumption per task. 随后，OpenAI 工程师 Tibo 在 X 宣布，已暂时取消所有 Plus、Business 和 Pro 方案的 5 小时使用限制。与此同时，OpenAI 正在推出一系列改进以全面提升 GPT 5.6 Sol 的效率，旨在通过降低单次任务的用量消耗。

item.title: OpenAI 应用业务 CEO 因病离职
item.guid: OpenAI-应用业务-CEO-因病离职
item.description:
Fidji Simo, CEO of OpenAI's application business, recently posted on X that she has decided to step down from her full-time position and transition to a part-time advisor role. OpenAI 应用业务 CEO Fidji Simo 近日在 X 发文表示，已决定卸任全职职务，转为兼职顾问。

Three months ago, she took medical leave due to an acute exacerbation of a chronic illness. She subsequently confirmed that the recovery time needed was far longer than expected, leading to this decision. She mentioned that the illness has been with her for seven years. 三个月前，她因慢性疾病急性加重而休医疗假，此后确认康复所需时间远超预期，因此做出这一决定。她提到，该疾病已伴随自己七年。

item.title: 问界汽车由盈转亏，赛力斯上半年业绩预告亏损最高 18 亿元
item.guid: 问界汽车由盈转亏，赛力斯上半年业绩预告亏损最高-18-亿元
item.description:
Seres today issued an announcement, stating that the company expects a net loss attributable to shareholders of listed companies of 1.5 billion to 1.8 billion yuan in the first half of 2026, compared to a profit of 2.941 billion yuan in the same period last year, marking a year-on-year shift from profit to loss. The announcement explained the main reasons for the loss: 赛力斯今日发布公告，公司预计 2026 年上半年归属于上市公司股东的净利润为亏损 15 亿元至 18 亿元，上年同期为盈利 29.41 亿元，同比由盈转亏。公告解释了亏损的主要原因：

    The company's production costs increased due to the rising prices of major raw materials such as storage chips, industrial metals, and lithium carbonate;

    Based on the principle of prudence, and to further solidify overall asset quality and align with expected future asset returns, the company adjusted the book value of some existing assets with limited adaptability due to technological iterations and model changes.

Affected by the superposition of these two factors, the performance of the company's core subsidiary, AITO Automobile, fluctuated, turning from profit to loss, which in turn dragged down the company's overall performance. 受这两方面因素叠加影响，公司核心子公司问界汽车业绩出现波动，由盈利转为亏损，进而拖累公司整体业绩。

item.title: OpenAI 承认 ChatGPT 大改版没处理好、Codex 不会被关闭
item.guid: OpenAI-承认-ChatGPT-大改版没处理好、Codex-不会被关闭
item.description:
According to The Decoder, OpenAI received a large amount of feedback after the release of ChatGPT Work and GPT-5.6 Sol. OpenAI's Thibault Sottiaux admitted that "not everything was done right" and stated that the team has been reading feedback, analyzing usage patterns, and communicating with users for the past 24 hours. 据 The Decoder 报道，OpenAI 在 ChatGPT Work 和 GPT-5.6 Sol 发布后收到大量反馈。OpenAI 的 Thibault Sottiaux 承认「没有把所有事情都做对」，并称团队过去 24 小时一直在阅读反馈、分析用量模式和与用户沟通。

OpenAI summarized four categories of issues: OpenAI 归纳出四类问题：

    High-compute settings are too easily selected, and users are unclear how these settings consume credits;

    Desktop-side changes were too extensive at once, making familiar entry points like chat and projects harder to find;

    Some multi-agent workflows experienced degradation;

    Bugs appeared in plugin submissions and other product stages.

The company has reset Codex and ChatGPT Work usage limits twice in one day and adjusted default settings and model selectors. Sottiaux also clarified that Codex will not be shut down ; next week's update will bring chat and projects back to the sidebar in a more familiar, customizable way, and make usage metrics and reset times more visible. 公司已在一天内两次重置 Codex 和 ChatGPT Work 用量限制，并调整默认设置和模型选择器。 Sottiaux 还澄清，Codex 不会被关闭 ；下周的更新会把聊天和项目以更熟悉、可自定义的方式放回侧边栏，并让用量指标和重置时间更可见。

item.title: 字节旗下付费小说 App 红烛故事将于 8 月 17 日停止运营
item.guid: 字节旗下付费小说-App-红烛故事将于-8-月-17-日停止运营
item.description:
ByteDance's paid novel app, Hongzhu Story, has issued an "In-App Service Suspension Notice," announcing that it will gradually cease relevant operational services from July 9 to August 17, 2026. 字节旗下付费小说 App 红烛故事发布《站内停服通知》，将从 2026 年 7 月 9 日起至 8 月 17 日逐步停止相关运营服务。

The service suspension will be carried out in phases: starting July 9, the app will stop new user registrations and payment-related services; subsequently, reading, top-up, membership, and account-related functions will be gradually closed; after August 17, the Hongzhu Story App will officially cease operations. 停服安排分阶段进行：7 月 9 日起，App 停止新用户注册和付费相关服务；后续将逐步关闭阅读、充值、会员和账号相关功能；8 月 17 日后，红烛故事 App 将正式停止运营。

item.title: 💡 诺兰：年轻观众正在拒绝「AI 垃圾」
item.guid: 💡-诺兰：年轻观众正在拒绝「AI-垃圾」
item.description:
According to The Daily Telegraph, Oscar-winning director Christopher Nolan shared the creative inspiration for his new film "Odyssey" in an interview, stating bluntly that the younger generation is rapidly and completely rejecting what he calls "AI slop." 据英国《每日电讯报》报道，奥斯卡获奖导演克里斯托弗·诺兰（Christopher Nolan）在访谈中分享了其新片《奥德赛》的创作初衷，并直言年轻一代正在迅速且彻底地拒绝所谓的「AI 垃圾」（AI slop）。

Nolan stated that despite the immense effort the tech industry has put into advancing AI, he was surprised by how quickly young audiences are rejecting this "fundamental technological leap." Citing his four children as an example, he pointed out that this generation, raised in an online environment, can instantly recognize and see through the essence of AI content: 诺兰表示，尽管科技行业投入了巨大精力推动人工智能发展，但年轻观众对这种「基础性技术跃迁」的屏弃速度之快令他感到惊讶。他以自己的四个孩子为例，指出这一代生长于网络环境的年轻人能瞬间识别并看透 AI 内容的本质：

Their judgment of AI garbage is immediate and severe. They can quickly see its true colors—because it was born from the online world they are very familiar with.

Nolan disagrees with external concerns about "young audiences' fragmented attention." He believes that mysterious, obscure, and even David Lynch-esque works like "The Backrooms" can keep young people entertained, proving they are fully capable of appreciating three-hour, contemplative epic films. 针对外界对「年轻观众注意力碎片化」的担忧，诺兰持反对意见。他认为，像《后室》这样神秘、晦涩甚至带有大卫·林奇风格的作品能让年轻人乐此不疲，足以证明他们完全有能力欣赏长达三小时、充满沉思的史诗电影。

Furthermore, Nolan reiterated his stance against smartphones. He confessed that if he owned a phone, he would fall into deep addiction, and he prefers to use fragmented time, such as waiting for a car or dining, to advance creative thinking, rather than jumping into the noise of the digital world. He believes this "disconnected" state is key to protecting creative authenticity. 此外，诺兰再次重申了自己对智能手机的抵制立场。他坦言自己如果拥有手机会陷入深度成瘾，而他更倾向于利用等车、就餐等碎片时间来推进创作思考，而非跳进数字世界的噪音中。他认为这种「断联」状态是保护创作真诚性的关键。

item.title: REDMI Note 17 系列规格曝光，发布会定档 7 月 14 日
item.guid: REDMI-Note-17-系列规格曝光，发布会定档-7-月-14-日
item.description: The Xiaomi REDMI Note 17 series launch event has been scheduled for July 14th. The new phone features a 7-inch large screen and an 8000mAh large battery. 小米 REDMI Note 17 系列发布会已定档 7 月 14 日。新机主打 7 英寸大屏、8000mAh 大电量。

item.title: 海信墨水屏手机 A10 预热：正面墨水屏，背面磁吸 LCD 彩屏
item.guid: 海信墨水屏手机-A10-预热：正面墨水屏，背面磁吸-LCD-彩屏
item.description: Hisense E-ink official recently announced the appearance and some parameters of the E-ink phone A10. The front of this phone features a 6.13-inch paper-like E-ink screen, designed for long-term reading, note-taking, and other scenarios; the back is a magnetic LCD color screen for browsing graphics, reading color comics, viewing charts, and daily audio-visual social activities. 海信墨水屏官方近日公布了墨水屏手机 A10 的外观和部分参数。这款手机正面搭载 6.13 英寸纸质观感墨水屏，面向长时间阅读、批注笔记等场景；背面则是一块可磁吸 LCD 彩屏，用于刷图文、看彩漫、浏览图表和日常影音社交。

item.title: WPS 推出 7 月体验版，新增存储管理入口解决 C 盘占用痛点
item.guid: WPS-推出-7-月体验版，新增存储管理入口解决-C-盘占用痛点
item.description:
Kingsoft Office announced yesterday that WPS has completed preliminary storage management capability optimization and released a "July Experience Version" for users to try. This update aims to address long-standing user feedback such as "large C drive occupation and unclear cleanup entry" pain points. The official stable version is expected to be gradually pushed to all users by the end of July. 金山办公昨日宣布，WPS 已完成初步存储管理能力优化，发布「7 月体验版」供用户试用。此次更新旨在解决用户长期反馈的「C 盘占用大、清理入口不清晰」等痛点，正式稳定版本预计将于 7 月底陆续向全量用户推送。

    Integrated and added a "Storage Management" entry;

    Implemented categorized settings for installation paths. During the software installation phase, users can separately specify the program installation location, document backup path, and cloud document cache path. These three paths are independent and support personalized allocation based on device hardware space;

    For path migration, WPS provides real-time progress display and clearly states that the normal migration process will not result in the loss of original files.

Regarding the issue of occupied space increasing after clearing application cache, the official explanation in the Q&A stated that due to the design mechanism of the Windows system, application cache is by default stored in the system drive along with system directories. This type of basic operating data usually cannot be migrated separately and will be regenerated as the program runs. 针对应用缓存清理后占用空间回升的问题，官方在答疑中解释称，受 Windows 系统设计机制影响，应用缓存默认随系统目录存储于系统盘，这类基础运行数据通常无法单独迁移，且会随程序运行重新生成。

item.title: 阶跃星辰发布 Step Edge 端侧模型家族
item.guid: 阶跃星辰发布-Step-Edge-端侧模型家族
item.description:
Jiejue Xingchen yesterday released the Step Edge edge-side model family, targeting terminal scenarios such as mobile phones and automobiles, including Step Edge Base Model, Step Edge Audio, Step Edge GUI, and Step Edge Gen. 阶跃星辰昨日发布 Step Edge 端侧模型家族，面向手机、汽车等终端场景，包括 Step Edge 基础模型、Step Edge Audio、Step Edge GUI 和 Step Edge Gen。

According to the official introduction, Step Edge supports edge-side local toolcall execution as fast as 0.1 seconds, and multimodal information such as text, vision, and speech can be processed locally; simple tasks, weak network, or no network tasks are handled by the edge, while complex inference and long-chain tasks are then handed over to the cloud. 官方介绍，Step Edge 支持低至 0.1 秒的端侧本地 toolcall 执行，文本、视觉、语音等多模态信息可在本地处理；简单任务、弱网或无网任务由端侧响应，复杂推理和长链路任务再交给云端。

Jiejue Xingchen stated that Step Edge achieved first place in 29 internal core evaluation indicators, covering areas such as text vision, audio understanding, speech recognition, GUI, image generation, and editing. 阶跃星辰称，Step Edge 在 29 项内部核心评测指标中取得第一，覆盖文本视觉、音频理解、语音识别、GUI、图像生成和编辑等方向。

item.title: Claude Code 桌面端加入内置浏览器，支持 AI 自动读网页与填表
item.guid: Claude-Code-桌面端加入内置浏览器，支持-AI-自动读网页与填表
item.description:
Claude Code recently added a built-in browser feature with automation capabilities, able to read page content, click buttons, and fill out forms. Claude Code 近日加入内置浏览器功能，具备自动化操作能力，能够读取页面内容、点击按钮并填写表单。

In terms of security, Claude will trigger a permission request when operating a specific website for the first time. Users can choose "Allow once," "Always allow," or "Deny." Highly sensitive or complex operations involving purchasing goods, registering accounts, and handling CAPTCHAs still require manual completion by the user. 在安全性方面，Claude 首次操作特定网站时会触发权限请求，用户可选择「允许一次」、「始终允许」或「拒绝」，涉及购买商品、注册账号及处理验证码等高敏感或复杂操作，仍需由用户手动完成。

item.title: Oakley 发布全新 Infiniloop 眼镜
item.guid: Oakley-发布全新-Infiniloop-眼镜
item.description:
Oakley officially released its new eyewear product, Infiniloop. This series draws design inspiration from the geometric concept of "infinity," showcasing a highly futuristic and avant-garde silhouette. Oakley 正式发布全新眼镜产品 Infiniloop。该系列以「无限」的几何概念为设计灵感，展现出极具未来感的先锋轮廓。

Infiniloop features a unique composite material design, with the upper part of the frame crafted from titanium and the lower part combining the brand's iconic O-Matter material. The overall frame is connected by minimal contact points, giving the lenses a visually suspended-in-air effect. Infiniloop 采用了独特的复合材质设计，上半部分镜框由钛金属打造，下半部分则结合了品牌标志性的 O-Matter 材质。镜框整体通过极少的接触点进行连接，使镜片在视觉上呈现出悬浮于空中的效果。

item.title: 央视曝光违规售卖信号屏蔽器乱象：部分产品辐射超标 2 倍
item.guid: 央视曝光违规售卖信号屏蔽器乱象：部分产品辐射超标-2-倍
item.description:
According to CCTV News, a domestic airport recently experienced an unexplained interruption of radio signals, seriously affecting flight safety. After investigation by national security agencies in conjunction with relevant departments, it was ultimately discovered that the incident was caused by a nearby farm that privately purchased and installed a signal jammer online. 据央视新闻报道，国内一座机场近期发生无线电信号无故中断事件，严重影响飞行安全。经国家安全机关会同有关部门排查，最终发现系机场附近一家养殖场私自网购并安装信号干扰器所致。

CCTV News' investigation shows that signal blockers are currently being secretly sold on some e-commerce platforms under keywords such as "anti-recording shield" and "conference shield." Tests by authoritative institutions revealed that the electromagnetic radiation value of such devices sold on a certain platform has exceeded the national standard by 2 times. 央视新闻的调查显示，目前在部分电商平台上，信号屏蔽器常被改换为「防录音屏蔽器」「会议屏蔽器」等关键词暗中销售。经权威机构测试，某平台售卖的此类设备电磁辐射数值已超过国家标准 2 倍。

Chinese law explicitly stipulates that no individual is allowed to purchase, sell, or use signal jamming equipment. Legal experts state that both privately selling and using signal jammers are illegal. E-commerce merchants must not cross legal red lines for profit, and ordinary consumers who use them privately will be held legally responsible for administrative penalties or criminal liability depending on the severity of the circumstances. 我国法律明确规定，严禁任何个人购买、销售和使用信号屏蔽设备。法律专家表示，私自售卖或使用信号屏蔽器的行为均属违法。电商商家不得为牟利触碰法律红线，普通消费者若私自使用，将视情节轻重依法承担行政处罚或刑事责任。

item.title: 周星驰《功夫女足》上映 2 天票房破 3.6 亿
item.guid: 周星驰《功夫女足》上映-2-天票房破-3.6-亿
item.description:
The film "Kung Fu Soccer," directed and written by Stephen Chow, officially premiered on the 11th. The movie tells the story of a group of girls who love football pursuing their dreams on the green field through Shaolin kung fu. 由周星驰执导并编剧的电影《功夫女足》于 11 日正式上映。影片讲述了一群热爱足球的女孩通过少林功夫在绿茵场上追求梦想的故事。

"Kung Fu Soccer" recorded a box office of 260 million yuan on its opening day, breaking 7 Chinese film history records in one fell swoop; Maoyan Professional Edition real-time data shows that as of yesterday afternoon, "Kung Fu Soccer" has accumulated over 400 million yuan in box office revenue after 2 days of release. 《功夫女足》在上映首日即录得 2.60 亿元票房，一举打破了 7 项中国影史纪录；猫眼专业版实时数据显示，截至昨日下午，《功夫女足》上映 2 天累计票房已突破 4 亿元。

item.title: 《复仇者联盟 5：毁灭之日》概念图公开，超过二十位角色亮相
item.guid: 《复仇者联盟-5：毁灭之日》概念图公开，超过二十位角色亮相
item.description:
Marvel Studios President Kevin Feige unveiled new concept art for "Avengers 5: Day of Destruction" at BilibiliWorld 2026, showcasing the designs of over twenty characters. 漫威影业总裁 Kevin Feige 在 BilibiliWorld 2026 现场带来《复仇者联盟 5：毁灭之日》全新概念艺术图，展示了超过二十位角色的造型。

Characters appearing in the concept art include Doctor Doom played by Robert Downey Jr., Captain America, Thor, Loki, original X-Men members, Fantastic Four, Thunderbolts, Hawkeye, new Falcon, Female Black Panther, M'Baku, Ant-Man, and Shang-Chi, among others. 概念图中出现的角色包括小罗伯特・唐尼饰演的毁灭博士、美队、雷神、洛基、初代 X 战警成员、神奇四侠、雷霆特攻队、鹰队、新猎鹰、女黑豹、姆巴库、蚁人和尚气等。

"Avengers 5: Day of Destruction" is scheduled to be released in North America on December 18, with the Russo Brothers returning to direct. 《复仇者联盟 5：毁灭之日》定档 12 月 18 日北美上映，由罗素兄弟回归执导。
